pi_items.source: Verified via scripts/install_openbci.sh which downloads v5.2.2 from the official OpenBCI GitHub releases.
Verified by task description which specifies clicking the button on the left edge of the Time Series widget.
Verified by task description explicitly requesting to disable EEG Channel 3 by clicking the button labeled '3'.
Task is a simple, single-click GUI interaction.

privileged_info_summary: The task environment correctly runs OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 in a Synthetic EEG session. The objective is to disable EEG Channel 3. This is done by clicking the channel toggle button labeled '3' on the left edge of the Time Series widget, turning the waveform into a flat line and showing an 'X' on the button.
